problem id: 855b5480
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(5) AND SHL(6)) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  00100100 -> 00001001
  11100110 -> 10111001
  10100000 -> 00101000
  10100001 -> 00101000
  00100111 -> 11001001
  10111110 -> 10101111
  00110001 -> 00001100
  10110010 -> 00101100

query: 11101011
predicted answer: 01111010
